content.json:
# 💰 Microsoft Sentinel Cost Analysis (2026)

**Unified Pricing Model** | **Auxiliary Logs Support** | **ML-Powered Insights** | **Multi-Workspace Analytics**

---

This workbook provides comprehensive cost analysis using the latest Sentinel pricing models (2024+), including Auxiliary Logs, Search Jobs, and modern commitment tiers.

**Last Updated:** January 2026 | **Data Retention:** Interactive (90d) + Archive Support

parameters.name: Subscription
parameters.label: ☁️ Subscription
parameters.query:
Resources
| where type =~ 'microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces'
| summarize count() by subscriptionId
| project value = subscriptionId, label = subscriptionId, selected = true

parameters.name: Workspaces
parameters.label: 🗂️ Workspaces
parameters.query:
Resources
| where type =~ 'microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces'
| order by name asc
| project id, name

parameters.name: AnalyticsPrice
parameters.label: 💵 Analytics Price/GB
parameters.description: Unified pricing for Sentinel + Log Analytics (2024+ model)

parameters.name: E5Seats
parameters.label: 👥 E5/A5/F5/G5 Seats
parameters.description: Total eligible seats for Microsoft 365 benefit (10MB/user/day)

parameters.name: MonthlyBudget
parameters.label: 💰 Monthly Budget
parameters.description: Set your monthly budget for tracking

content.json:
## 📊 Cost Overview

High-level summary of your Sentinel costs across all selected workspaces.

content.title: Total Billable Ingestion
Average Daily Ingestion

content.query:
let CurrentMonth = Usage
| where TimeGenerated >= startofmonth(now())
| where IsBillable == true
| summarize CurrentGB = sum(Quantity) / 1000
| extend CurrentCost = CurrentGB * {AnalyticsPrice};
let Budget = {MonthlyBudget};
CurrentMonth
| extend BudgetRemaining = Budget - CurrentCost
| extend PercentUsed = round((CurrentCost / Budget) * 100, 1)
content.title: Budget Status (MTD)
Daily Ingestion Trend
Top 10 Tables by Cost

content.query:
Usage
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange:query}
| where IsBillable == true
| extend Category = case(
    DataType has "AAD" or DataType has "Signin", "Identity",
    DataType has "Device", "Endpoints",
    DataType has "Email", "Email Security",
    DataType has "Cloud", "Cloud Apps",
    DataType has "Firewall", "Network",
    "Other"
)
| summarize GB = sum(Quantity) / 1000 by Category
| extend Cost = GB * {AnalyticsPrice}
content.title: Cost by Category
Archive Storage (90d+) - Monthly Retention Cost

content.query:
let RetentionDays = 90;
let ArchiveStart = ago(RetentionDays * 1d);
union withsource=_TableName *
| where TimeGenerated < ArchiveStart
| summarize ArchiveGB = sum(_BilledSize) / 1024 / 1024 / 1024 by _TableName
| where ArchiveGB > 0.1
| extend MonthlyCost = ArchiveGB * {ArchivePrice}
| order by ArchiveGB desc
| take 20
| project 
    ['Table Name'] = _TableName,
    ['Archive Size (GB)'] = round(ArchiveGB, 2),
    ['Monthly Retention Cost'] = round(MonthlyCost, 2)
content.title: Top 20 Tables by Archive Storage (>90 days)

content.query:
Usage
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange:query}
| where IsBillable == true
| make-series DailyGB = sum(Quantity)/1000 default=0 on TimeGenerated from {TimeRange:start} to {TimeRange:end} step 1d
| extend anomalies = series_decompose_anomalies(DailyGB, 1.5, -1, 'linefit')
| mv-expand TimeGenerated to typeof(datetime), DailyGB to typeof(double), anomalies to typeof(double)
| where anomalies != 0
| extend AnomalyType = iff(anomalies > 0, "Spike", "Dip")
| extend Severity = abs(anomalies)
| top 10 by Severity desc
content.title: Cost Anomalies Detected

content.json:
## 📥 Ingestion Analysis

Detailed breakdown of data ingestion across all tables.

content.query:
Usage
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange:query}
| where IsBillable == true
| summarize TotalGB = sum(Quantity) / 1000, RecordCount = count() by DataType
| extend Cost = TotalGB * {AnalyticsPrice}, AvgRecordSize = (TotalGB * 1024 * 1024) / RecordCount
| top 50 by Cost desc
| project DataType, TotalGB, RecordCount, AvgRecordSize, Cost
content.title: Top 50 Tables by Cost

content.query:
Usage
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange:query}
| where IsBillable == true
| where DataType endswith "_CL"
| summarize TotalGB = sum(Quantity) / 1000, RecordCount = count() by DataType
| extend Cost = TotalGB * {AnalyticsPrice}
| project 
    ['Custom Table'] = DataType,
    ['Size (GB)'] = TotalGB,
    ['Records'] = RecordCount,
    ['Monthly Cost'] = Cost * 30
| order by ['Monthly Cost'] desc
content.title: Custom Logs Analysis

content.json:
## 🎯 Cost Optimization

AI-powered insights to reduce Sentinel costs.

content.query:
Usage
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange:query}
| where IsBillable == true
| where DataType !in ("SecurityAlert", "SecurityIncident")
| summarize TotalGB = sum(Quantity) / 1000 by DataType
| extend CurrentCost = TotalGB * {AnalyticsPrice}, AuxiliaryCost = TotalGB * {AuxiliaryPrice}, MonthlySavings = (TotalGB * {AnalyticsPrice} - TotalGB * {AuxiliaryPrice}) * 30
| where MonthlySavings > 50
| project DataType, TotalGB, MonthlySavings
| top 20 by MonthlySavings desc
content.title: 📦 Auxiliary Logs Candidates (85% Savings)

content.query:
Usage
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange:query}
| where IsBillable == true
| where DataType endswith "_CL"
| summarize TotalGB = sum(Quantity) / 1000, RecordCount = count() by DataType
| extend AvgRecordSizeKB = (TotalGB * 1024 * 1024) / RecordCount
| where AvgRecordSizeKB > 10
| extend MonthlyCost = TotalGB * {AnalyticsPrice} * 30
| extend PotentialSavings = MonthlyCost * 0.30
| order by MonthlyCost desc
| project 
    ['Custom Table'] = DataType,
    ['Avg Record Size (KB)'] = AvgRecordSizeKB,
    ['Monthly Cost'] = MonthlyCost,
    ['Potential Monthly Savings'] = PotentialSavings,
    ['Recommendation'] = "Review data collection - consider filtering or transformation"
content.title: 🔧 Oversized Custom Logs (Transformation Opportunities)

content.json:
## 📦 Auxiliary Logs Analysis

**Auxiliary Logs** provide up to **85% cost savings** for data that:
- Doesn't require real-time analytics
- Needs long-term retention for compliance
- Is used primarily for investigations

**Limitations:**
- 8-day latency for queries
- Cannot be used in analytics rules
- No built-in alerting

content.query:
Usage
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange:query}
| where IsBillable == true
| where DataType !in ("SecurityAlert", "SecurityIncident", "Heartbeat")
| summarize TotalGB = sum(Quantity) / 1000
| extend CurrentCost = TotalGB * {AnalyticsPrice}, AuxiliaryCost = TotalGB * {AuxiliaryPrice}
| extend Savings = CurrentCost - AuxiliaryCost, SavingsPercent = round(((CurrentCost - AuxiliaryCost) / CurrentCost) * 100, 0)
| project 
    ['Current Analytics Cost'] = CurrentCost,
    ['Auxiliary Logs Cost'] = AuxiliaryCost,
    ['Potential Savings'] = Savings,
    ['Savings %'] = SavingsPercent
content.title: Cost Comparison: Analytics vs Auxiliary

content.query:
Usage
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange:query}
| where IsBillable == true
| summarize TotalGB = sum(Quantity) / 1000 by DataType
| extend CurrentCost = TotalGB * {AnalyticsPrice}, AuxiliaryCost = TotalGB * {AuxiliaryPrice}
| extend MonthlySavings = (CurrentCost - AuxiliaryCost) * 30
| extend Eligibility = case(
    DataType in ("SecurityAlert", "SecurityIncident"), "❌ Not Eligible",
    DataType has "Heartbeat", "❌ Not Eligible",
    DataType endswith "_CL" and TotalGB > 10, "✅ Excellent Candidate",
    DataType has "Firewall" or DataType has "Proxy", "✅ Excellent Candidate",
    TotalGB > 5, "✅ Good Candidate",
    "⚠️ Review Required"
)
| where Eligibility startswith "✅"
| order by MonthlySavings desc
| project 
    ['Table Name'] = DataType,
    Eligibility,
    ['Size (GB)'] = TotalGB,
    ['Monthly Savings'] = MonthlySavings
content.title: Auxiliary Logs Eligibility Assessment

content.json:
## 🔒 Commitment Tier Analysis

**Commitment Tiers** provide discounts for predictable ingestion:

| Tier | Discount | Break-even |
|------|----------|------------|
| 100 GB/day | 50% | ~51+ GB/day |
| 200 GB/day | 55% | ~181+ GB/day |
| 500 GB/day | 60% | ~477+ GB/day |
| 1000 GB/day | 61% | ~976+ GB/day |
| 2000 GB/day | 63% | ~1898+ GB/day |

parameters.name: CommitmentWorkspace
parameters.label: Select Workspace
parameters.query:
Resources
| where type =~ 'microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces'
| where id in ({Workspaces})
| project id, name

parameters.name: CurrentCT
parameters.query:
resources
| where type =~ 'microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces'
| where id == '{CommitmentWorkspace}'
| extend ct = properties.sku.capacityReservationLevel
| project ct = iff(isempty(ct), "0", tostring(ct))

content.query:
Usage
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange:query}
| where IsBillable == true
| summarize DailyGB = sum(Quantity) / 1000 by bin(TimeGenerated, 1d)
| summarize AvgDaily = avg(DailyGB), P95 = percentile(DailyGB, 95), StdDev = stdev(DailyGB)
content.title: Daily Ingestion Statistics

content.query:
Usage
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange:query}
| where IsBillable == true
| summarize DailyGB = sum(Quantity) / 1000 by bin(TimeGenerated, 1d)
| summarize P95Daily = percentile(DailyGB, 95)
| extend RecommendedCT = case(
    P95Daily <= 51, 0,
    P95Daily between (51 .. 180), 100,
    P95Daily between (181 .. 286), 200,
    P95Daily between (287 .. 390), 300,
    P95Daily between (391 .. 476), 400,
    P95Daily between (477 .. 975), 500,
    P95Daily between (976 .. 1897), 1000,
    P95Daily between (1898 .. 4729), 2000,
    P95Daily >= 4730, 5000,
    0
)
| extend CurrentCT = toint('{CurrentCT}')
| extend Status = iff(CurrentCT == RecommendedCT, "✅ Optimal", iff(CurrentCT > RecommendedCT, "⚠️ Over-committed", "💡 Under-committed"))
| extend CurrentTier = iff(CurrentCT == 0, "PAYG", strcat(CurrentCT, " GB/day")), RecommendedTier = iff(RecommendedCT == 0, "PAYG", strcat(RecommendedCT, " GB/day"))
| project Status, CurrentTier, RecommendedTier, P95Daily
content.title: Commitment Tier Recommendation (Based on P95)

content.query:
Usage
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange:query}
| where IsBillable == true
| summarize DailyGB = sum(Quantity) / 1000 by bin(TimeGenerated, 1d)
| extend CT100 = 100, CT200 = 200, CT500 = 500, CT1000 = 1000
| project TimeGenerated, DailyGB, CT100, CT200, CT500, CT1000
content.title: Daily Ingestion vs Commitment Tier Levels

content.json:
## 🏔️ Sentinel Data Lake Analysis

**Microsoft Sentinel Data Lake** provides ultra-long-term storage for compliance and audit requirements.

**Pricing (as of 2026):**
- Storage: £0.02/GB/month (same as Archive tier)
- Search: £0.005/GB scanned
- No ingestion charges for data moved from Sentinel

**When to Use Data Lake:**
- Data older than 2 years
- Legal hold / eDiscovery requirements
- Compliance mandates (7+ year retention)
- Historical trend analysis

**Key Differences from Archive Tier:**

| Feature | Archive Tier | Data Lake |
|---------|--------------|------------|
| **Retention Period** | 90 days - 2 years | 2+ years (unlimited) |
| **Query Method** | Search Jobs + Restore | Data Lake queries |
| **Location** | Log Analytics workspace | Separate Data Lake storage |
| **Cost** | £0.02/GB/month | £0.02/GB/month + search |
| **Best For** | Medium-term compliance | Long-term audit/legal |

content.title: Data Lake Migration Opportunity (Data >1 year old)

content.query:
let DataLakeThreshold = ago(365d);
union withsource=_TableName *
| where TimeGenerated < DataLakeThreshold
| summarize DataLakeGB = sum(_BilledSize) / 1024 / 1024 / 1024 by _TableName
| where DataLakeGB > 1
| extend MonthlySavings = DataLakeGB * ({ArchivePrice} - {DataLakePrice})
| order by DataLakeGB desc
| take 20
| project 
    ['Table Name'] = _TableName,
    ['Size Over 1yr (GB)'] = round(DataLakeGB, 2),
    ['Current Archive Cost'] = round(DataLakeGB * {ArchivePrice}, 2),
    ['Data Lake Cost'] = round(DataLakeGB * {DataLakePrice}, 2),
    ['Monthly Savings'] = round(MonthlySavings, 2)
content.title: Top 20 Tables for Data Lake Migration (Data >1 year old)

content.json:
### 📋 Implementation Steps

**To migrate data to Sentinel Data Lake:**

1. **Enable Data Lake in your Sentinel workspace**
   - Navigate to Microsoft Sentinel → Settings → Data retention
   - Enable "Long-term retention" and configure Data Lake storage

2. **Configure retention policies**
   - Set which tables should move to Data Lake after Archive tier
   - Default: Move to Data Lake after 2 years in Archive

3. **Query Data Lake**
   ```kql
   // Query example for Data Lake
   externaldata (TimeGenerated:datetime, ...)
   [
     "https://<storageaccount>.blob.core.windows.net/..."
   ]
   ```

4. **Monitor costs**
   - Storage costs: Fixed per GB/month
   - Query costs: Per GB scanned
   - Set up alerts for unexpected query volumes

**Best Practices:**
- Move data >2 years old to Data Lake
- Keep frequently queried data in Archive tier
- Use Data Lake for compliance/legal hold scenarios
- Consider data lifecycle: Interactive → Archive → Data Lake

---

## 📚 Resources

- [Microsoft Sentinel Pricing](https://azure.microsoft.com/pricing/details/microsoft-sentinel/)
- [Azure Monitor Pricing](https://azure.microsoft.com/pricing/details/monitor/)
- [Auxiliary Logs Documentation](https://learn.microsoft.com/azure/sentinel/basic-logs-configure)
- [Commitment Tiers Guide](https://learn.microsoft.com/azure/sentinel/billing#commitment-tiers)
- [Cost Optimization Best Practices](https://learn.microsoft.com/azure/sentinel/billing-reduce-costs)

**Workbook Version:** 2026.01 | **Created by:** [noodlemctwoodle](https://sentinel.blog)
